An '''arachnor''' was a giant arachnoid that resided on [[Arzid]]. Its web was one of the stickiest in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="The Essential Guide to Alien Species" />

==Biology and appearance==
Arachnors were large, [[Spider/Legends|spider]]-like creatures that lived in the [[Macaab mushroom]] [[Forest/Legends|forests]] of Arzid, feeding mostly on the giant [[Fungus/Legends|fungi]] that were plentiful there. However, they also ate the flesh of living creatures. The fungi that they ate contained chemicals which made their webs the stickiest in the galaxy. They were nonsentient, but knew how to frighten prey into their webs.<ref name="The Essential Guide to Alien Species" />

{{Creature-stub}}
